name: Beeple (Mike Winkelmann)
description: Mike Winkelmann — known as Beeple — has posted a new digital artwork every single day since 2007, accumulating one of the most obsessive creative streaks in art history. His 'Everydays: The First 5000 Days' sold at Christie's in 2021 for $69 million, making it one of the most expensive artworks ever sold and thrusting NFTs and digital art into mainstream conversation.
